name: Clear Secure, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Clear Secure, Inc. (the Company or CLEAR) is a secure identity company making experiences safer and easier - both digitally and physically. We make everyday experiences frictionless by connecting your identity to all the things that make you, YOU - transforming the way you live, work, and travel. CLEAR has been delivering secure, frictionless experiences in airports for over 15 years, achieving exceptional user delight and trust with CLEAR+, our consumer travel subscription servi...
